title: 7 Effective Herbal Tinctures for Teachers with Irritated Throats
description: Achillea millefolium tinctures have been traditionally used to help soothe throat irritation due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant contains constituents like sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which work together to reduce swelling and fight off infections in the throat.
